chunks.title: Prayer for God's Favor
chunks.reason: The psalmist asks God to be gracious and bless His people so that salvation is known among the nations.

chunks.title: Call for Universal Praise
chunks.reason: A repeated call for all peoples and nations to praise God and rejoice in His righteous judgment.

chunks.title: Prayer for Continued Blessing
chunks.reason: Acknowledging God's provision of produce and a final petition that all the earth may fear Him.
